class="msg-left text-formated preText ml-2 mr-2 p-0 ng-star-inserted">As we approach the lunchtime inflection SPX is up 40 bps, NDX getting the better of it up nearly 2%. In this moment I don't feel left out for not buying, but I also struggle to see an easy short. After days like we had on Friday it makes sense to give the market a little time to find itself. This is not margin call Monday kind of action, but at the same time it's not a screaming buy. What this is at the heart of it, if you can step away from it for a second and take the 40k ft view, is chop.

Friday's drop let's the air out of the market, but the market is still bullish. I think these opposing forces should promote two-sided trade for the next 8 trading days. That'll take us into the witching expiration then we'll have a whole new basket of decisions. Until then I'm holding what I have and looking for clues into the close. TSLA might be forming a slingshot Squeeze on the daily chart but if I'm trying to buy it into the end of the year I've got to think I've got some &quot;Open Sans&quot;, sans-serif;"><br></h2><h2 class="" style="color: rgb(103, 103, 103); font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, sans-serif;"><br></h2><h2 class="" style="color: rgb(103, 103, 103); font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, sans-serif;">1 on 1 Coaching - Precision Edge Discovery</h2><p style=""><strong data-start="169" data-end="203" style="color: rgb(103, 103, 103); font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, sans-serif;">Precision Edge Discovery (PED)</strong><font face="Open Sans, sans-serif"> is a structured trading performance coaching program focused on diagnosing and correcting the behavioral and process-level causes of trading inconsistency. The program is not strategy- or product-specific; it applies equally to day traders and swing traders, and to those trading futures, stocks, or options. PED addresses the common failure point where traders understand concepts but struggle to execute consistently under pressure. Through structured assessment, trading plan development, and ongoing accountability, the program aligns a trader’s methods with their decision-making tendencies, risk tolerance, and operational constraints reducing emotional interference and improving execution reliability over time.</font><br><br><b style="color: rgb(103, 103, 103); font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 36px;">Full Client Experience (updated 4/18)</span></b><span style="color: rgb(103, 103, 103); font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, sans-serif; font-size: 36px;">: </span><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1c9p_UisNMjAGibszSU7yEsWU4ZDk0N53/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(103, 103, 103); font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 36px;">Here</span></a>&nbsp;- Spots open now!<br><span style="color: rgb(103, 103, 103); font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, sans-serif; font-size: 36px;"><b>1 on 1 Coaching Application:</b> </span><a href="https://forms.gle/5rNQx8HmwzidtfGk8" target="_blank" style="color: rgb(103, 103, 103); font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 36px;">Here</span></a><br><br></p><h3 class="" style=""><font face="Open Sans, sans-serif">Need help with your trading psychology?
